response.justification: Aisha has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and exposure to AI-agent tooling, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform strategy leadership, or advanced AI credentials required for a director-level AI strategy role; the resume also contains inconsistent name/email mismatches that raise red flags about authenticity.
strengths: Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative with open-source GIS platform used by NGOs
Strong full-stack and systems engineering experience across multiple languages and domains
Active contributor to developer tooling and AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq
concerns: No clear evidence of building or leading AI/ML products or platforms as required
Lacks advanced degree in AI or demonstrable recognized expertise in AI strategy
Resume contains name/email mismatches (Aisha Okonkwo vs. Szabo Bogdan) suggesting potential fraud
